name: Sky-Grazers
size: immense, bulbous creatures with thick, wooly hides

behavior.danger: airships 'drafting' behind a herd for safety often get caught in the crossfire of a feeding frenzy

mortality.effect: internal gas sacs expand uncontrollably, overcoming gravity

graveyard: upper stratosphere, to freeze in the void or be pulled into the gravity well of the Broken Moon (Shatterface)
